title: ledenbergia peruviana
intro: Ledenbergia peruviana, also known as Lippia alba, is a plant species native to the Americas, belonging to the verbena family and commonly known as Mexican Oregano or Peruvian Lippia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Ledenbergia peruviana include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used as a spice to add flavor to food.
